org.arakhne.tinyMAS.situatedEnvironment.agent

Class PerceptionInterestFilter<PT extends Perception<?>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.situatedEnvironment.agent.PerceptionInterestFilter<PT>
  • Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public abstract class PerceptionInterestFilter<PT extends Perception<?>>
extends Object
    This class defines a filter for agent's perceptions.

    This filter is mainly used to focus the perception of the agent on objects/agents that are directly under interest.

    This

    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>

      • filter

        public final void filter(PT[] percepts)
        Deprecated. 
        Make a filter of the percepts.
        Parameters:
        percepts - is the percepts replied by the environment. It could be null or empty.

      • filter

        protected abstract PerceptionInterestFilter.PerceptionState filter(PT percept)
        Deprecated. 
        Make a filter of the percepts.

        The system already make a filtering depending on the agent's body.

        Parameters:
        percept - is the percept replied by the environment.
        Returns:
        the state of the given percept.

      • savePerception

        protected abstract boolean savePerception(PT percept,
                     PerceptionInterestFilter.PerceptionState state)
        Deprecated. 
        Save the given perception inside internal structures.
        Parameters:
        percept - is the perception to save
        state - is the detected state of the given perception. It will permit to this function to know what to do with the perception.
        Returns:
        true if the specified percept was saved by this function, otherwise false. In this last case, the percept will be save inside the generic data structure that containing perceived objects.

      • getPerceivedObjects

        public List<PT> getPerceivedObjects()
        Deprecated. 
        Replied the perceived objects.

      • hasPerceivedObjects

        public boolean hasPerceivedObjects()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies if objects were perceived.
